description: This video explains KYC (Know Your Customer) and AML (Anti-Money Laundering) processes used by Binance to enhance security and protect users. It covers the importance of identity verification, monitoring transactions, and compliance with global regulations.
topic_summary: KYC and AML are essential for securing crypto accounts and preventing fraud. KYC verifies user identities to protect against unauthorized access [t=38:30]. AML regulations help combat money laundering and ensure transparency in transactions [t=111:00].
